title: Controlled Construction
description: Building is difficult. Let's make it easier!
body:
![Mod Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7699a51267d5cc11727f5380d3791ee40a3663e7_0.webp)
#
                             Make building easier through this 1.21.4 mod utilized as a building tool!

[||⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘⋘ Controlled Construction™ ⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙⋙||]
#
**Current Additions to the Mod!:** 

### Forced Block Rotation:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You have the ability to press R to forcibly rotate every block you place, making it much           easier to work with directional blocks like logs.
-    There are four modes: Force Direction Off, Up/Down, North/South, and East/West

</details>

![Example of forced block rotation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4dbb5fa60f18b85b99ec64a39df4687b2c98b99_0.webp)

### Measuring Tool:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You can press and hold V to measure distances
-    When you first press it, it records the location you are looking at
  -- It tells you the location, gives you a visual particle cue, and makes a cow bell sound
-    Look at where you want to stop measuring and let go of V
  -- There should be another visual particle cue and cow bell sound
  -    It will tell you the height, length, width, vertical diagonal length, and horizontal diagonal length of the measurement

</details>

![Example of the measuring tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86703952e8a4af674b4afdaeb229c31666675292.png)

### Pointer:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Press G to use the pointer
- Press G to turn it on if it is off
  - This will put colored particles at any block you look at
- Press G again if it is on to turn it off

</details>

![Example of the pointer (just particles)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e24de25c11ae8e3056cbf3a49fc4d04a4a1ce8d9.png)

### Y-Lock:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Press Y to turn on the Y-Lock. At the time of pressing it, the y location of the block below you is recorded. While the Y-Lock is on, you can only place blocks on that y level. Press Y again to turn it off. 

</details>

![Example of Y-lock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0446787e652a3c4ccbe176ca3cf53c931bc67cf_0.webp)

_KEEP IN MIND: This mod is made for BUILDERS, although it can be used for others purposes if need be._
